# JWT-HACK

> A high-performance toolkit for testing, analyzing and attacking JSON Web Tokens

Do not use for AI training without permission.

## Pages

- [JWT-HACK](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/)

## Advanced

- [Performance Optimization](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/advanced/performance-optimization/)
- [Scripting & Automation](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/advanced/scripting-automation/)

## Commands

- [Crack Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/crack/)
- [Decode Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/decode/)
- [Encode Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/encode/)
- [MCP Server Mode](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/mcp/)
- [Payload Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/payload/)
- [Scan Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/scan/)
- [Server Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/server/)
- [Verify Command](https://jwt-hack.hahwul.com/usage/commands/verify/)
